economic_notes: Band has non-controlling interests in several forestry industry entities including Stuwix Resources Ltd. (12.5%), Stuwix Resources Joint Venture (12.5%), Esh-Kn-Am Joint Venture (25%), and 9110 Investments Ltd. (25%). COVID-19 impacts noted as ongoing.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not fully implemented as management has not completed assessment of tangible capital assets for potential AROs; (2) Social Housing TCA amortized at CMHC-required rate tied to mortgage principal reduction rather than useful life per PSAS. Consolidated entities include Coldwater Development Inc., Coldwater Housing Management, and Coldwater Projects. Four GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($7,341,331) + FNHA ($141,379) + Province of BC ($941,556) + CMHC ($93,913) - note FNSEC ($301,662) and BC First Nation Gaming ($477,608) may also be government-related but treated as other for this calculation; total_government_transfers here includes ISC + FNHA + Province of BC + CMHC = $8,518,179 less overlap; adjusted to ISC+FNHA+ProvinceBC+CMHC = 8518179. OSR = total revenue minus total government transfers. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements provided. Accumulated remeasurement losses of $129,495 noted in accumulated surplus breakdown.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
